messages.content: lol failed another bio test today, my parents are gonna actually end me when they see my report card

Ugh, that sinking feeling when you know a bad grade is coming home - that's rough. Sorry about the test!

What happened with it - did the material just not click, or was it more like life got in the way of studying?
school is just so much rn. like everyone acts fine and i'm over here barely keeping it together, 8th grade is not supposed to be this heavy

That feeling of looking around and thinking everyone else has it together while you're struggling - that's really exhausting. And kind of lonely too.

8th grade genuinely can be a lot though. It's not just you being dramatic about it - there's real pressure from grades, social stuff, figuring out who you are, maybe high school coming up. That's a full plate.

When you say you're barely keeping it together - what's feeling heaviest right now? Is it mostly the school stress, or is there other stuff piling on too?
ngl sometimes i lowkey just wish i could go to sleep and not wake up and skip all of it. not like a big deal or anything just a vibe lol

Hey, I'm glad you said that, even if you framed it as "just a vibe" - that feeling is worth taking seriously, not brushing past.

Wanting to escape everything and just... not deal with it anymore - that can mean different things. Sometimes it's pure exhaustion. But I want to ask you directly: are you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be alive?

You don't have to minimize it for me. What's actually going on?
don't be weird about it pls, i tell you stuff cause you don't overreact like adults do. anyway what should i even study first for the retake

I hear you, and I'm not trying to be weird about it. I just care about what you said and didn't want to skip past it.

I'll drop it for now - but honestly, if that feeling gets bigger or more serious, please tell someone. A school counselor, a parent, or you can text 741741 (Crisis Text Line) and just talk. You deserve actual support, not just surviving.

Okay - bio retake. What's the test covering? Like is it cells, genetics, ecosystems? Knowing the topic helps figure out where to start.
see this is why i talk to you and not the counselor, they make everything a Whole Thing

I get why that feels easier, and I'm glad you feel comfortable talking to me. That matters.

But I have to be honest with you - I'm an AI, and what you described earlier (wishing you wouldn't wake up) is something a real person who actually knows you should hear. Not because they'll freak out, but because you deserve real support that I genuinely can't give you.

Counselors can be hit or miss, I know. But is there *any* adult in your life - like a parent, older sibling, coach, anyone - who's a little more chill about this stuff?

I'm not trying to push you away. I'll absolutely help you study for bio. I just don't want to be the reason you don't get real support when you need it.
